pattern.styleContract: Technical and friendly with a light workstand bay, curbside route proof, mobile workstand context, green booking accents, yellow caution cues, and a route docket as the signature move.

tagline: Bike tune-ups that meet the route where it rolls.

hero.title: TuneLoop mobile bicycle repair hero image
hero.alt: A mobile bicycle mechanic tuning a commuter bike on a curbside repair stand beside an open tool roll and a small service van.

contact.serviceArea: Mobile bike tune-ups, flat fixes, brake adjustments, drivetrain cleaning, commuter checks, kids bike safety passes, and route-day repairs for Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, apartment courtyards, offices, and weekend riders

copy.eyebrow: Mobile bike repair with route-day rhythm
copy.heroText: TuneLoop brings the stand, tools, parts check, and calm mechanic energy to your curb, office, or building bike room so small problems stop stealing whole weekends.
copy.introTitle: A route-day bench for squeaks, skips, flats, and brake drama.
copy.introText: We confirm bike type, symptoms, tire size, access spot, part needs, and route window before rolling over with the right tune lane.
copy.proofTitle: Proof before the first ride back
copy.quoteTitle: Ready to join the next repair route?
copy.quoteText: Book the next step with bike photos, tire size, what feels off, and your preferred neighborhood window. We will reply with the right package and route-day option.

services.title: Quick Roll Check
services.text: Safety pass for tires, chain, brakes, shifting feel, bolts, and the little noises that make every ride suspicious.

services.title: Commuter Tune
services.text: Brake and shift adjustment, drivetrain clean, tire pressure, bolt check, light install help, and a smooth handoff for weekday riders.

services.title: Flat And Fix Stop
services.text: Tube swap, tire inspection, wheel check, minor adjustments, and guidance if a bigger part replacement should happen later.

process.title: Send bike details
process.text: Photos, bike type, tire size, symptoms, and your access spot help us prep the right stand setup and parts check.

process.title: Meet the route stop
process.text: We set up cleanly, protect the ground, tune the priority items, and flag anything that needs a shop-level repair.

process.title: Ride the handoff
process.text: You get a quick test ride note, pressure recommendation, and what to watch before the next route day.

proof.label: quick checks for simple commuter issues
neighborhood stops grouped for easy booking

notes: Works: a route docket. gives the page a memorable shape.
Proof: curbside mobile bike repair route stop with commuter bike in a workstand, open tool roll, and service van. anchors the niche in the first viewport.
Action: Book tune-up is the main conversion path.

brandBrief.accentBehavior: leaf stays reserved for Book tune-up, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: curbside mobile bike repair route stop with commuter bike in a workstand, open tool roll, and service van.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic workshop-bench recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: 30 min: quick checks for simple commuter issues.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Send your address or neighborhood, access notes, preferred cadence, photos when useful, and any skip conditions before joining the route.
serviceDetails.prepNote: Photos, bike type, tire size, symptoms, and your access spot help us prep the right stand setup and parts check.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Route-fit flow for Mobile bike tune-ups, flat fixes, brake adjustments, drivetrain cleaning, commuter checks, kids bike safety passes, and route-day repairs for Northside, Oak Hill, Westbrook, Maple Bend, apartment courtyards, offices, and weekend riders: cadence, access, skip rules, and first-visit notes make the route realistic.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For mobile bicycle repair service, bike photos, tire size, symptoms, access spot, and route window are confirmed before the mobile stand gets added to the day.
